mapper.sql: history_id AS historyId, user_id AS userId, case_id AS caseId, browse_time AS browseTime, insert_time AS insertTime, update_time AS updateTime
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO browse_history (user_id, case_id, browse_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{caseId}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE browse_history SET browse_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE history_id = #{historyId}
